title: gilia achilleifolia var. chamissonis
intro: Gilia achilleifolia var. chamissonis, also known as chamisson's gilia, is a perennial herb native to the western United States and is a variety of the Achillea millefolium plant. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, fever, and respiratory problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Gilia achilleifolia var. chamissonis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a valuable component in natural remedies.
